ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_icons" (
  "icon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon */,
  "icon_name" TEXT /* Name of the icon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition it represents */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "precip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred units, alerts settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the forecast */,
  "forecast_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the forecasted weather conditions */,
  "forecast_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the forecasted weather conditions */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecasting model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the forecast */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the forecast has been validated */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* External reference IDs or links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for the alert */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert */,
  "alert_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the affected area */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "api_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access log */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for access */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., retrieve, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the API request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the API request */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* Status code of the API response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the API request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for the analysis */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for the analysis */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period over which the analysis is made */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Identified trend in the weather data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the analysis */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the analysis has been validated */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* External reference IDs or links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_analysis_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_analysis_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
